---
title: "PREDICTS Metadata Extraction Pipeline"
format:
  html:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    number-sections: false
    smooth-scroll: true
---

# Introduction

This project extracts metadata from ecological papers to help populate the PREDICTS PV07 form.

# Pipeline overview

The extractor uses several sources of evidence:

| Source | Purpose |
|---|---|
| PDF text | Title, abstract, methods, dates, regions |
| Docling tables | Study sites, species counts, sampling information |
| OCR | Maps, figures, scanned tables |
| Vision model | Map/table interpretation |
| Repository downloads | CSV, Excel, ZIP and supplementary data |
| LLM fallback | Fill missing fields only when deterministic extraction fails |

# Example: Jarrett et al. 2021

## Input

Scientific paper on bird communities in African cocoa agroforestry.

## Extracted fields

| Field | Extracted value |
|---|---|
| Country | Cameroon; Equatorial Guinea |
| Region | Southern Cameroon |
| Sites | 83 |
| Dates | 1990–2020 |
| Sampling method | Mist-netting |

# Output

The pipeline produces:

- metadata JSON
- filled PREDICTS PDF form
- downloaded data files
- extracted tables
- OCR and vision evidence
